nasb.text: There is no one who calls on Your name, Who arouses himself to take hold of You; For You have hidden Your face from us And have delivered us into the power of our iniquities.

esv.text: There is no one who calls upon your name, who rouses himself to take hold of you; for you have hidden your face from us, and have made us melt in the hand of our iniquities.

cnv.text: 沒有人呼求你的名， 沒有人奮起抓著你； 因為你掩面不顧我們， 使我們在自己罪孽的權勢下融化。

ccb.text: 无人呼求你， 无人向你求助， 因为你掩面不理我们， 让我们在自己的罪中灭亡。

csbs.text: 没有人呼求你的名， 没有人奋起去紧抓你； 因为你向我们掩面， 使我们在自己罪孽的权势下消融。
